violations.text: The outside dumpster is not covered. Cover was observed in poor repair. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Establishment must repair, or replace dumpster lids. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025
The gasket located on the milk case in the back was not in good repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

Wood is used in the construction of mechanical dishwasher detergent dispenser. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The Dishwasher is in poor repair at the time of the inspection. Per person in charge dishwasher will be repair at the end of the day. Proof of repairs will be sent to inspector as a correct action. All utensils and equipment will be sent to the High School for wash rinse and sanitized. Email received from Tracy on 4/17/2021 Same day of the inspection(person in charge at the school) Dishwasher was fixed and ready to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2023
